items.title: Mini Pie Sugar Cookie Box
items.alt_text: Open dessert box with decorated sugar cookies designed like mini pies with buttercream borders, lattice details, and flower accents.
items.notes: These are decorated sugar cookies styled to look like mini pies. Corrected from Custom Cakes to Sugar Cookies.

items.title: Lemon Birthday Cake
items.alt_text: White birthday cake decorated with yellow lemon slices, lemon shapes, green leaves, and gold birthday lettering.
items.notes: Strong custom cake image; bright, clean, and broadly appealing.

items.title: Sweet Fork Vendor Booth Display
items.alt_text: The Sweet Fork vendor booth display with packaged desserts, menu signage, samples, and bakery branding at an indoor event.
items.suggested_use: About/events section or supporting gallery only
items.notes: Brand/lifestyle image rather than a specific product photo. Current category mapping is imperfect unless the site supports events, about, or lifestyle media.

items.title: Blue and White Buttercream Cupcake Set
items.alt_text: Blue and white buttercream cupcakes with pearl and gold accents arranged on a wooden serving tray.
items.notes: Good supporting image; similar to boxed blue and white cupcake photo, so avoid over-featuring both.

items.title: Blue and White Pearl Cupcakes
items.alt_text: Box of blue and white frosted cupcakes decorated with gold and pearl sprinkles.
items.notes: Strong cupcake gallery image with polished color palette and decoration detail.

items.title: Lemon Cupcake Display
items.alt_text: Lemon-themed cupcakes with white buttercream, yellow lemon decorations, and green leaf accents on a dessert table.
items.notes: Good event-style cupcake image, but check exposure/brightness during processing.

items.title: Confetti Sprinkle Cupcakes
items.alt_text: Box of white frosted confetti cupcakes topped with colorful round sprinkles.
items.notes: Simple, useful cupcake variety image; good for birthday and party browsing.

items.title: Christmas Sugar Cookie Set
items.alt_text: Decorated Christmas sugar cookies shaped like candy canes, stars, snowflakes, and Christmas trees.
items.notes: Strong seasonal cookie image for holiday marketing.

items.title: Pink and Coral Macaron Box
items.alt_text: Box of pink and coral macarons arranged in two rows with cream filling.
items.notes: Strong macaron product photo with clean packaging and color contrast.

items.title: Raspberry Chocolate Cupcakes
items.alt_text: Chocolate cupcakes topped with pink raspberry buttercream, fresh raspberries, and small green leaf accents.
items.notes: Strong customer-facing cupcake image and good candidate for featured placement.

items.title: Boxed Mini Pie Sugar Cookies
items.alt_text: Boxed decorated sugar cookies designed like mini pies shown through a bakery box window with The Sweet Fork label.
items.notes: These are decorated sugar cookies styled to look like mini pies. Packaging photo is useful as a supporting gallery image, though the box window glare makes it less ideal for featured placement.
